titleStmt.title: SII 19.309: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 309. (A.R. No. 94 of 1925.) KĪḶAIYŪR, MAYURAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON A PILLAR IN THE CENTRAL SHRINE, VĒDAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records an agreement given by the Peruṅguṟi-perumakkaḷ (assembly) of Tiruvaḻundūr a brahmadēya in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu exempting from all taxes, 1/2 veli and 2 mā of land endowed after purchase by Kaṇṇaṉ Mallaṉ alias Udaiyamāttāṇḍa-Mūvēndavēḷār of Nāgankuḍi in Ambar-nāḍu for the maintenance of a flower-garden which he had formed for god Tirukkadavuḍai[ya]-Emberumānār. This seems to refer evidently to a Vishṇu temple as seen by the expression Sri-Vaishṇavarakshai at the end and as the name of the god in this temple as given in other inscriptions is Agnīśvara. This is assignable to Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakesaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 10 2- Ā
vatu tiruvaḻuntūrnāṭṭu brahmateyam tiruvaḻuntūr peruṅ
kuṟip perumakkaḷom Amparnāṭṭu nākaṅkuṭi nākaṉkuṭi
kkiḻāṉ kaṇṇaṉ mallaṉṉāṉa Utaiyamāttāṇṭa
muveṉtaveḷār tam perāl tām tirukkatavuṭaiya Empe
rumānārkku Eṅkaḷ kallūrāṉa tiruvampākkūr tirukku(ṭa)ṟaiyi
l tām muṉ ceyvitta Utaiyamāttāṇṭa muveṉtave
ḷāṉāṉa karumukait tirunaṉtavaṉattukku nīr Iṟaippārkkum(t)ti
ruppaḷḷittāmam paṟippārkkum toṭuppārkkumāka tiruna
n=tavāṉapuṟamāka ceṟṟiyaṉ māṟaṉ vaṭukaṉniṭai vilaikoṇṭa
nilam Aṟumāvum ceṟṟiyaṉ pāṭṭattil ṉārāyaṇanni
ṭai vilai koṇṭa nilam Aṟumāvumāka ṉilam Araiye
Iraṇṭu māvukkum kiḻpārkkellai Iraiya nila nārāyaṇa
ṉ ṉilan tiraṉ muṉpu Ittiruṉaṉtavāṉanilattukku
melkkum teṉpāṟkkellai tāṉatoṅkavākkālukku va
ṭakkum melpāṟkkellai Iṉṉamit tāṉatoṅkavācakālu
kkum tirukkatavuṭaiya perumāṉ tirukkuṟaikku pāyum ṉir nakkallukku
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai ceṟṟiyaṉ Iraiya nila ṉārāyaṇaṉ ni
lattukkum pāyum kaḷavākkālukkut teṟkkum ṉaṭuvupaṭṭa ṉilam mikitik
kuṟai Uḷḷaṭaṅka ṉilam Araiye Iraṇṭumā Araiye Iraṇṭu
māvukkum veṇṭum Iṟaiyum Eccoṟum maṟṟum kāvalil
poṉta kuṭimaiyum maṟṟum Ūr kuṭimaiyum kāttu
kuṭuppatāka Ikkaṇṇa mallaṉṉāṉa Utaiyamāttāṇṭa muven=tave
ḷḷārkku Ittirunan=tavāṉappuṟam cantrātittavaṟ Iṟaiyili
ceytukuṭuttu kkoṇṭa Īḻakkaruṅkācu Irupattaiñcu Ikkācu
m koṇṭu Iṉṉilam Araiye Iraṇṭu māvukkum Iṟaiyili ceytu
kuṭuttom peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷḷom Iṉṉilam
m potu perumakkaḷ taṭukkil Iruṉūṟu poṉ ma
tanittani taṭukkil ta pom pon Utaiyamāttāṇṭamuve
ṉtaveḷārkkum maṟṟum
ppaṭṭa śrī
ṟuppittu miṉṉilam Iṟaiyili
vatākavum Ipparicu Ikkācu Irupattañcuṅ ko
tirukkatavuṭaiya perumā(mā)ḷukku tirukkuṟaikkaru
māka can=tirātittavaṟ Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭuttom tiruvaḻuntūr
p peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom Ivai śrīvaiṣṇavarrakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.309 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
